issues.description: Example: "Get started" CTA on the welcome screen — pressed state barely differs from idle, hard to tell the tap registered on slower devices.
Example: intro carousel dot indicators sit slightly too close to the bottom edge on phones with gesture bars — give them a few px more clearance.
Example: account-deletion form — helper text under the email field wraps awkwardly at 360px width; shorten the copy or allow two clean lines.
